ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "api_path" TEXT /* API path for accessing song details */,
  "primary_artist" TEXT /* Name of the primary artist performing the song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the song lyrics */,
  "song_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Full lyrics of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the song contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been downloaded */,
  "lyrics_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the lyrics were last updated */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the song is a featured track */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist associated with the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "album_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album art */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label associated with the album */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album is a compilation */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was last modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is public */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the playlist has been played */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the playlist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song included in the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was added to the playlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "favorite_genres" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's favorite genres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is spam */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is flagged for review */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the song */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date when the like was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_genres" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre followed by the user */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user followed the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song in the chart */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the chart */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the chart entry */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., top 100, new releases) */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the chart */,
  "chart_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the chart has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new song, new album) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
